stemHtml: How does VMCG change with an increase in field elevation and temperature? VMCG...

options.a: decreases, because the amount of thrust developed by the operating engine is reduced.
options.b: increases, because at a lower density a larger IAS is necessary to generate the required rudder force.
options.c: decreases, because VMCG is expressed as an IAS and that decreases with decreasing density.
options.d: increases, because V<sub>MCG</sub> is related to V? and that increases when the density decreases.
